programme.title: Find Me a Luxury Home
programme.desc: Married couple Deysha and Todd are looking for a home, but with Todd traveling on business, Deysha previews homes alone.

programme.title: Dream Cruises
programme.desc: The sister ship of Le Soleil and Le Boreal.

programme.title: Travel in Style
programme.desc: A Spanish style safari in Toledo; sailing along the Benagil Sea in Algarve.

programme.title: Private Islands
programme.desc: Once a pirate's paradise, Scrub Island has been transformed into a luxurious getaway.

programme.title: Behind the Gates
programme.desc: A designer home situated in Hollywood Hills; a contemporary mansion with a view of the Pacific Ocean in prestigious La Jolla; a European villa set amongst Hollywood royalty.

programme.title: Travel Thru History
programme.desc: A visit to the old south in Savannah, Ga.; a stroll through the city's squares; a visit to the civil war past at Old Fort Jackson; the stairs of the famous Tybee Island lighthouse; a visit to the Savannah Railroad museum.

programme.title: 5 Star Getaways
programme.desc: This series is a sun-filled invitation to travel and visit magnificent all-inclusive 5 star resorts throughout the world, their magnificent surroundings and the exciting excursions one can do at each destination.

programme.title: Facing Waves
programme.desc: Mild weather and warm waters welcome Nikki Gregg as she stand up paddles along the variety of coastlines that draw paddlers and adventurers to the Azores; crystal clear volcanic lakes, world-class surf spots and stunning coastal communities.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Most Amazing Homes
programme.desc: From magnificent and spacious, to stunning architectural feats, with mind-boggling budgets, these mega-mansions include everything one could ever dream of; a private tour of the homes of the rich and the famous.

programme.title: Road Less Traveled
programme.desc: Jonathan finds an extreme type of holy man reputed to eat human flesh and commit other blatant acts of embracing taboos in a strange path to nirvana.

programme.title: Dream Cruises
programme.desc: A look at what are considered to be some of the best cruises in the world.

programme.title: Lux Lifestyles
programme.desc: A look at Belize.

programme.title: Top Travel
programme.desc: A visit to the bustling streets and markets of Ho Chi Min City, Vietnam.

programme.title: Travel in Style
programme.desc: The "Game of Thrones" set in Northern Ireland; the private island of Parrot Cay in Turks and Caicos.

programme.title: Blue World
programme.sub-title: Sand Tiger Sharks + Marine Biology in Turks & Caicos
programme.desc: Jonathan heads down to the shipwrecks of North Carolina to observe how these wrecks have become home to thousands of animals, including Sand Tiger sharks.

programme.title: Private Islands
programme.desc: One degree above the equator lies Laamu, a place where luxury and sustainability coexist.

programme.title: Behind the Gates
programme.desc: A prestigious oceanside villa on the bluff of Pacific Palisades; a contemporary rebuild with a view of San Diego Bay; a manor positioned on the sand in Santa Barbara.

programme.title: Travel Thru History
programme.desc: Fountain of Youth; Castillo de San Marcos; St. Augustine Pirate & Treasure Museum.

programme.title: Dream Cruises
programme.desc: Seeing the wonders of the fall spectrum from Montreal all the way to Boston; the St. Lawrence River, the Saguenay fjord, the Iles Mingan, Percé, the Fortress of Louisbourg and Lunenburg are featured.

programme.title: Selling Mega Mansions
programme.desc: Francis and Connie are ready to explore the amazing grounds of 9614 Palmetto Park Road; George and Susan tour mega mansions in Dallas with Heather Stegman of Rogers Healy.

programme.title: Find Me a Luxury Home
programme.desc: Married couple Craig and Belenda are looking to escape the city life for a quieter pace in Arcadia.

programme.title: Dream Purchase
programme.desc: Dream Purchase follows the realization of an American dream; everyone has dreamed of owning that special thing; for some its a classic car, for others a luxury home and for some even a helicopter or luxury yacht.

programme.title: Private Islands
programme.desc: One degree above the equator lies Laamu, a place where luxury and sustainability coexist.

programme.title: Distant Shores
programme.desc: Canyoning, milking and volcanic lava tubes in Sao Jorge.

programme.title: Lux Lifestyles
programme.desc: A look at Belize.

programme.title: Facing Waves
programme.desc: Nikki Gregg discovers spectacular wilderness lakes and secluded sections of river on her SUP and visits the vibrant country community of London Laurel County, Kentucky.

programme.title: Top Travel
programme.desc: A visit to the bustling streets and markets of Ho Chi Min City, Vietnam.

programme.title: Find Me a Beach House
programme.desc: A couple tries to find the perfect seaside location to call their home.

programme.title: Selling Jets
programme.desc: A retired couple from Southlake, Texas, looks to simplify their travels with a jet while having a condo in Breckenridge, Colo., a house in Seaside, Fla., and family spread out across the U.S., so they've asked Jack Lambertto to help.

programme.title: Travel in Style
programme.desc: The "Game of Thrones" set in Northern Ireland; the private island of Parrot Cay in Turks and Caicos.

programme.title: Road Less Traveled
programme.desc: In a country where anything can be found, Jonathan is unsurprising to find women in different roles and status, but the extremes are shockingly diverse and unexpected.

programme.desc: Francis and Connie are ready to explore the amazing grounds of 9614 Palmetto Park Road; George and Susan tour mega mansions in Dallas with Heather Stegman of Rogers Healy.

programme.desc: Canyoning, milking and volcanic lava tubes in Sao Jorge.

programme.title: Boys Toys
programme.desc: Traveling to Abu Dhabi to capture the latest and greatest toys showcased in the jewel of the United Arab Emirates.

programme.title: Travel in Style
programme.desc: Beach buggy adventures in Povo; Monaco and the hill top town of Eze.

programme.title: Blue World
programme.sub-title: Shark's Tonic Immobility in the Bahamas + Diving With NASA
programme.desc: Jonathan travels to the Bahamas to meet Neal Harvey, a world-renowned shark handler who will attempt to teach Jonathan how to put Caribbean Reef sharks into a relaxed state known as tonic immobility.

programme.title: Private Islands
programme.desc: The island of St. Lucia.

programme.title: Behind the Gates
programme.desc: A home with a colorful past, housing some of the biggest names in Hollywood and a mansion with rustic charm above the bluffs of the Pacific Palisades.

programme.title: Travel Thru History
programme.desc: Exploring Colorado's past through interactive attractions and first hand accounts.

programme.title: Dream Cruises
programme.desc: This cruise visits the most stunning golf courses of the Mediterranean; Ports of Call: Portoferraio (Elba), Piombino(Tuscany), Golfo Aranci (Sardinia), Bonifacio (Corsica), Cannes and St.Tropez (France).

programme.title: Selling Mega Mansions
programme.desc: Recently-divorced Peter brings his daughter Chloe to help him choose a new home in South Florida; trust-fund-rich Brad and Heather go shopping for their first mega purchase in Dallas.

programme.title: Find Me a Luxury Home
programme.desc: Kevin, a party-loving resident of Palm Springs, is looking to upgrade his desert lifestyle.

programme.title: Dream Purchase
programme.sub-title: In the Market for a Porsche
programme.desc: A guest realizes their dream of buying a Porsche.

programme.title: Private Islands
programme.desc: The island of St. Lucia.

programme.title: Distant Shores
programme.desc: The Azorean island of Sao Miguel offers volcanic faults that heat the pool and runs the power plant.

programme.desc: Christina Cindrich visits Cuba, an island nation full of amazing sights and intoxicating flavors.

programme.title: Facing Waves
programme.desc: Among the numerous islands and atolls of Papua New Guinea, Nikki Gregg experiences traditional festivals, charged canoe races and embarks on an exploratory trip down a remote river.

programme.title: Top Travel
programme.desc: A visit to the bustling streets and markets of Ho Chi Min City, Vietnam.

programme.title: Find Me a Beach House
programme.desc: Glen and Sheila are looking for the beach lifestyle; they search in Manhattan Beach, Calif.

programme.title: Selling Jets
programme.desc: Life long friends Angela and Sam have both become widows in the past two years; they're looking to start a new chapter in their lives by partnering up to purchase a private jet so they can visit their families.

programme.desc: Beach buggy adventures in Povo; Monaco and the hill top town of Eze.

programme.desc: Italy in the summer is as touristy as it gets...can Jonathan still find the road less traveled?
